ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the client registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the client (active, inactive) */,
  "tax_identification_number" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the client */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the client */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login of the client */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the client record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the client record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the account belongs to */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial account (e.g., savings, checking) */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (active, inactive) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_accounts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial account the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "source_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source account for the transaction */,
  "destination_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination account for the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_destination_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_account_id") REFERENCES financial_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES financial_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_source_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_account_id") REFERENCES financial_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the earning belongs to */,
  "total_earning" REAL /* Total earnings for the client */,
  "received_amount" REAL /* Amount received by the client */,
  "amount_in_wallet" REAL /* Amount currently in the client's wallet */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* ID of the month the earning is associated with */,
  "pending_payment" TEXT /* Status of pending payment (e.g., A for active, P for pending) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the earnings */,
  "source_of_income" TEXT /* Source of the income */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the earning record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the earning record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the earning record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the earning record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES monthly_transactions ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_transactions" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly transaction record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the monthly transaction belongs to */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions in the month */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of transactions in the month */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the transactions */,
  "total_deposits" REAL /* Total amount of deposits in the month */,
  "total_withdrawals" REAL /* Total amount of withdrawals in the month */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the monthly transaction record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the monthly transaction record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the monthly transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the monthly transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pending_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pending payment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the pending payment belongs to */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the pending payment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the payment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pending payment record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the pending payment record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pending payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pending payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pending_payments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, account manager, financial analyst) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial record being accessed (e.g., earnings, transactions) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES earnings ("earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
